Description.description: Description of the IP entry. Cannot start with http:// or https://. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Can include numbers, English commas (,), periods (.), underscores (_), spaces ( ), equals signs (=), hyphens (-), Chinese commas (，), and Chinese periods (。). Length limit: 1–255 characters. If not specified, defaults to an empty string

Entry.description: IP entry address range; only CIDR addresses are supported

AclType.description: Control mode of the listener for this access control policy group. white: Allowlist mode; black: Denylist mode

Key.description: User tag key. Length limit: 1–128 characters. Case sensitive. Cannot start with any combination of volc: or sys: (case insensitive). Cannot start or end with a space. Supports characters from all languages, numbers, spaces (), underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), slashes (/), equals signs (=), plus signs (+), hyphens (-), and @. Tag keys for the same resource must be unique

Value.description: User tag value. Length limit: 0–256 characters. Case sensitive. Cannot start or end with a space. Supports characters from all languages, numbers, spaces (), underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), slashes (/), equals signs (=), plus signs (+), hyphens (-), and @

description: ALB provides listener-level access control. If you want to allow only certain IPs or deny only certain IPs from accessing the ALB instance through the listener port, you can set an access control policy for this listener. You can configure access control when creating the listener, or modify or reconfigure access control after the listener is created

AclEntries.description: Details of IP entries in the access control policy group

AclEntryCount.description: Number of IP entries in the access control policy group

AclName.description: Name of the Access Control Policy Group. Cannot start with http:// or https://. Must begin with a letter or Chinese character and may include numbers, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). Length must be between 1 and 128 characters. If left blank, defaults to the Access Control Policy Group ID.

CreatedTime.description: Creation time of the access control policy group

Description.description: Description of the Access Control Policy Group. Cannot start with http:// or https://. Must begin with a letter or Chinese character and may include numbers, English commas (,), periods (.), underscores (_), spaces ( ), equals signs (=), hyphens (-), Chinese commas (，), and Chinese periods (。). Length must be between 1 and 255 characters. If left blank, defaults to an empty string.

Listeners.description: Details of listeners associated with the access control policy group

ProjectName.description: Project name to which the access control policy group belongs

Status.description: Status of the access control policy group. Creating: Creating. Active: Available. Configuring: Configuring. Deleting: Deleting

Tags.description: Tags bound to the access control policy group

UpdatedTime.description: Last operation time of the access control policy group
